{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Data Analyst",
  "description": "American International Insurance Company (AIICO) Insurance Plc. is a Life Assurance Company which commenced operations in Nigeria in 1963. AIICO insurance plc is the leading player in the industry with the largest and most profitable agency network in Nigeria. It has acquired the highest quality of learning systems and processes.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Data Analyst

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos, Nigeria

Job Description


	The role is responsible for transforming data into actionable insights that guide decision-making across different SBU in the organization.
	The role focuses on analyzing and validating data, creating interactive reports and dashboards, and presenting findings that helps management improve performance, enhance customer satisfaction, and reduce risks.


Job Details


	Analyze diverse insurance datasets (claims, policies, production, renewals, payments) to uncover patterns, risks, and opportunities. Conduct root-cause analysis on challenges such as early policy surrenders, delayed claims, or low persistency, while also performing customer sentiment analysis to identify satisfaction drivers.
	Build and maintain interactive Power BI dashboards and reports using DAX and Power Query/M Query, translating complex datasets into clear, actionable insights. Deliver periodic (monthly/quarterly) and ad-hoc reports to management with strong narratives behind the numbers.
	Support leadership with evidence-based recommendations that improve customer satisfaction, boost loyalty, reduce compliance risks, and enable data-driven decision-making across SBUs.
	Partner with Claims, Underwriting, Customer Service, and Finance teams to address business needs, design KPIs, and provide guidance on interpreting dashboards and reports.
	Uphold high data quality standards through validation and consistency checks, ensuring reliable insights that inform critical business actions. Continuously enhance reporting processes for greater clarity, efficiency, and business relevance.
	Champion data-driven culture by empowering teams to interpret and act on analytics, fostering an environment where decisions are guided by facts rather than guesswork.


Requirements


	HND/B.Sc. in Statistics, Computer Science or any related discipline with&nbsp;2 - 4 years of experience.
	Knowledge of Python is an added advantage
	PL300 certification is an added advantage

Data Analyst Job at American International Insurance Company




        
    

        
        American International Insurance Company (AIICO) Insurance Plc. is a Life Assurance Company which commenced operations in Nigeria in 1963. AIICO insurance plc is the leading player in the industry with the largest and most profitable agency network in Nigeria. It has acquired the highest quality of learning systems and processes.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Data Analyst

Job Location: Lagos, Nigeria

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The role is responsible for transforming data into actionable insights that guide decision-making across different SBU in the organization.
	The role focuses on analyzing and validating data, creating interactive reports and dashboards, and presenting findings that helps management improve performance, enhance customer satisfaction, and reduce risks.


Job Details


	Analyze diverse insurance datasets (claims, policies, production, renewals, payments) to uncover patterns, risks, and opportunities. Conduct root-cause analysis on challenges such as early policy surrenders, delayed claims, or low persistency, while also performing customer sentiment analysis to identify satisfaction drivers.
	Build and maintain interactive Power BI dashboards and reports using DAX and Power Query/M Query, translating complex datasets into clear, actionable insights. Deliver periodic (monthly/quarterly) and ad-hoc reports to management with strong narratives behind the numbers.
	Support leadership with evidence-based recommendations that improve customer satisfaction, boost loyalty, reduce compliance risks, and enable data-driven decision-making across SBUs.
	Partner with Claims, Underwriting, Customer Service, and Finance teams to address business needs, design KPIs, and provide guidance on interpreting dashboards and reports.
	Uphold high data quality standards through validation and consistency checks, ensuring reliable insights that inform critical business actions. Continuously enhance reporting processes for greater clarity, efficiency, and business relevance.
	Champion data-driven culture by empowering teams to interpret and act on analytics, fostering an environment where decisions are guided by facts rather than guesswork.


Requirements


	HND/B.Sc. in Statistics, Computer Science or any related discipline with 2 - 4 years of experience.
	Knowledge of Python is an added advantage
	PL300 certification is an added advantage
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Representative",
  "description": "Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment &amp; Selection, Performance management, Training &amp; Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a dedicated, empathetic, and detail-oriented Customer Service Representative to join our team in Port Harcourt.
	The successful candidate will act as the primary point of contact for our customers, providing exceptional service via phone, email, and social media.
	The ideal candidate must have a proven track record of using CRM tools to manage interactions, resolve complaints, and enhance customer satisfaction.


Responsibilities


	Customer Support:&nbsp;Respond promptly to customer inquiries, complaints, and requests professionally via phone, WhatsApp, and email.
	CRM Management:&nbsp;Utilize CRM software (e.g., Zendesk, HubSpot, Zoho) to document, track, and update all customer interactions, feedback, and resolutions.
	Issue Resolution:&nbsp;Resolve customer complaints effectively, troubleshoot issues, and provide timely solutions to ensure high retention rates.
	Data Maintenance:&nbsp;Maintain accurate and up-to-date customer records, including contact details and transaction history.
	Collaboration:&nbsp;Coordinate with sales and logistics teams to expedite service delivery and resolve complex queries.
	Reporting:Gather customer feedback and generate reports on common issues to assist in improving service delivery.


Job Requirements


	Education:&nbsp;HND or Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or related fields.
	Experience:&nbsp;Minimum of 1&ndash;3 years of proven experience in a customer service or support role.
	CRM Skills:&nbsp;Mandatory experience using CRM toolsto log interactions and manage customer accounts.
	Location:&nbsp;Must be a resident of Port Harcourt.
	Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills (English).
	
		Strong problem-solving abilities and emotional intelligence.
		Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word).
		Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and manage high call volumes.
	
	


Salary:&nbsp;N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to:&nbsp;cvs@odixcityconsulting.com.ng&nbsp;using &quot;Customer Service Representative - Port Harcourt&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Customer Service Representative Job at Odixcity Consulting




        
    

        
        Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment & Selection, Performance management, Training & Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a dedicated, empathetic, and detail-oriented Customer Service Representative to join our team in Port Harcourt.
	The successful candidate will act as the primary point of contact for our customers, providing exceptional service via phone, email, and social media.
	The ideal candidate must have a proven track record of using CRM tools to manage interactions, resolve complaints, and enhance customer satisfaction.


Responsibilities


	Customer Support: Respond promptly to customer inquiries, complaints, and requests professionally via phone, WhatsApp, and email.
	CRM Management: Utilize CRM software (e.g., Zendesk, HubSpot, Zoho) to document, track, and update all customer interactions, feedback, and resolutions.
	Issue Resolution: Resolve customer complaints effectively, troubleshoot issues, and provide timely solutions to ensure high retention rates.
	Data Maintenance: Maintain accurate and up-to-date customer records, including contact details and transaction history.
	Collaboration: Coordinate with sales and logistics teams to expedite service delivery and resolve complex queries.
	Reporting:Gather customer feedback and generate reports on common issues to assist in improving service delivery.


Job Requirements


	Education: HND or Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or related fields.
	Experience: Minimum of 1–3 years of proven experience in a customer service or support role.
	CRM Skills: Mandatory experience using CRM toolsto log interactions and manage customer accounts.
	Location: Must be a resident of Port Harcourt.
	Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills (English).
	
		Strong problem-solving abilities and emotional intelligence.
		Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word).
		Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and manage high call volumes.
	
	


Salary: N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using "Customer Service Representative - Port Harcourt" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

	Prepare and process purchase orders in accordance with company procedures

Procurement Assistant Job at Nigeria Sinotruck Limited




        
    

        
        Nigeria Sinotruck Limited is a commercial automotive company that is interested in starting a vendor leasing desk.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Assistant

Job Location: Sagamu, Ogun

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Procurement Assistant to support the procurement team in sourcing goods and services, managing supplier relationships, and ensuring timely and cost-effective purchasing in line with company policies.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Assist in sourcing suppliers and obtaining quotations for required materials and services
	Prepare and process purchase orders in accordance with company procedures
	Maintain accurate records of purchases, pricing, and supplier information
	Follow up with vendors on order status, delivery schedules, and discrepancies
	Support vendor evaluation and maintain good supplier relationships
	Ensure compliance with internal procurement policies and approval processes
	Assist in inventory tracking and stock level monitoring (where applicable)
	Provide administrative support to the procurement team


Requirements


	ND in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or related field with 1 year of experience in procurement or administrative support role
	Good knowledge of procurement processes and vendor management
	Strong negotiation and communication skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook)
	Attention to detail and strong organizational skills


Key Competencies:


	Integrity and professionalism
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
	Team player with a proactive attitude


Method of Application

title: Job Openings at Origin Group
content:
Origin Group operates in some major industries such as agriculture, manufacturing, civil engineering, automobile, logistics and hospitality across 4 continents. Through innovation and resourcefulness, we are harnessing our nation’s physical and human resources to create value for the average consumer.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Procurement Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage all procurement activities,from vendor sourcing through to purchase order management and delivery — ensuring best value, quality and compliance.


Responsibilities


	Develop and manage the approved vendor list and vendor pre-qualification process
	Lead competitive tendering processes for materials, plant and services
	Negotiate framework agreements and long-term supply contracts
	Manage purchase order placement, tracking and expediting
	Ensure all procurement complies with company policies and ethical sourcing standards
	Analyse market pricing and maintain Nigerian construction material rate schedules
	Coordinate with project teams on procurement plans and material delivery schedules
	Manage procurement KPIs and produce monthly management reports
	Handle supplier disputes, quality rejections and contractual claims
	Champion procurement digitalisation and continuous improvement


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree with 10 – 12 years of procurement experience, preferably in construction or engineering in Nigeria.
	At least 5 years of managing a procurement team
	Strong knowledge of the Nigerian construction supply chain and material markets
	Experience with ERP procurement modules: SAP, Oracle or equivalent
	Track record of achieving measurable cost savings through strategic procurement


Application Closing Date: 15th May, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

2.) Construction Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Take full site responsibility for construction delivery from mobilisation to handover
	Manage site teams, subcontractors and suppliers on a day-to-day basis
	Monitor and control construction programme, cost and quality
	Enforce a zero-accident HSE culture on all sites
	Resolve technical issues, manage RFIs and implement site instructions
	Chair progress meetings and produce client and management reports
	Manage procurement and delivery of materials and plant to site
	Conduct quality inspections and maintain complete site records
	Manage temporary works, logistics and site set-up
	Manage subcontractor performance and commercial relationships.


Requirements


	10 – 13 years of post-COREN or post-CORBON registration (mandatory)
	At least 5 years as a site or project manager after achieving full registration
	Managed construction of buildings or infrastructure projects valued ?500M and above
	Experience managing large site teams (50+ workers) in Nigeria
	Strong knowledge of construction methods, temporary works and sequencing.


Application Closing Date: 15th May, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

 

3.) Irrigation Project Lead

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Lead end-to-end deployment of irrigation systems across multiple sites.
	Develop detailed project plans, schedules, and resource allocation.
	Monitor progress, resolve bottlenecks, and ensure timely delivery.
	Act as the primary liaison with Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs).
	Manage vendor relationships, contracts, and performance.
	Ensure supply chain efficiency and timely delivery of equipment/materials.
	Serve as the main point of contact for clients during project execution.
	Provide regular updates, manage expectations, and address concerns.
	Build strong client relationships to drive repeat business.
	Commercial & Financial Management
	Control project budgets, track expenditures, and ensure profitability.
	Drive commercial outcomes by optimizing costs and improving margins.
	Prepare financial reports and forecasts for management.
	Supervise field engineers, technicians, and subcontractors.
	Ensure adherence to safety, quality, and compliance standards.
	Mentor junior staff and foster a culture of accountability.
	Oversee testing, commissioning, and handover of irrigation systems.
	Ensure compliance with environmental, safety, and regulatory requirements.
	Conduct post-deployment reviews to capture lessons learned.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering, Agricultural Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or Water Resources Engineering (Master’s degree preferred).
	8–10 years of progressive experience in project deployment or operations within irrigation, water management, or related engineering fields.
	Proven track record of delivering large-scale infrastructure projects on time and within budget.
	Professional certifications such as PMP (Project Management Professional) or Prince2 are highly desirable.
	Training or certification in Occupational Health & Safety and Quality Management Systems is an advantage.
	Leadership skills
	Communication and collaboration
	Organizational skills
	Working in tough conditions


Application Closing Date: 15th June, 2026.

Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Logistics Manager",
  "description": "Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment &amp; Selection, Performance management, Training &amp; Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;(Onsite)

Job Summary


	We are for looking for a logistics manager who knows the courier business from the inside out. The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing end-to-end logistics, ensuring timely deliveries, and improving operational efficiency across our distribution network.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage courier fleets (Bikes, vans, cars) for same day and scheduled deliveries.
	Optimize delivery routes to reduce costs and improve speed.
	Coordinate real-time dispatch and rerouting during disruptions.
	Track LPIs on time deliveries, RTO rates, cost per stop.
	Lead driver briefings, training, and performance reviews.
	Work with technology teams to improve TMS and tracking tools.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 2+ years in logistics management, specifically with courier or last-minute services.
	Hands on experience with route planning, POD systems, and real-time tracking
	Proven ability to reduce late deliveries and operational costs.
	Strong leadership and team management skill.
	Proficiency in logistics software and tracking systems .
	Strong communication and problem- solving skills for fast paced environments.


Salary
N120,000 / Montn

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;cvs@odixcityconsulting.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the email.",

Logistics Manager Job at Odixcity Consulting




        
    

        
        Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment & Selection, Performance management, Training & Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are for looking for a logistics manager who knows the courier business from the inside out. The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing end-to-end logistics, ensuring timely deliveries, and improving operational efficiency across our distribution network.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage courier fleets (Bikes, vans, cars) for same day and scheduled deliveries.
	Optimize delivery routes to reduce costs and improve speed.
	Coordinate real-time dispatch and rerouting during disruptions.
	Track LPIs on time deliveries, RTO rates, cost per stop.
	Lead driver briefings, training, and performance reviews.
	Work with technology teams to improve TMS and tracking tools.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 2+ years in logistics management, specifically with courier or last-minute services.
	Hands on experience with route planning, POD systems, and real-time tracking
	Proven ability to reduce late deliveries and operational costs.
	Strong leadership and team management skill.
	Proficiency in logistics software and tracking systems .
	Strong communication and problem- solving skills for fast paced environments.


Salary
N120,000 / Montn

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the email.
